_comment: P4 chain FRONT edge (the public VPS). A wildcard zone groups several vhosts into one route that reverse-proxies them DOWNSTREAM to the home edge (10.0.0.13:443) — it does NOT terminate per-host here and carries no auth. Paired with seed-chain-home.json + settings-chain-p4.json. crenel FOLLOWS THROUGH to resolve each host's real backend + auth at the home edge.
